Our Products & Services

Batteries for Every Need

From small hatchbacks to heavy commercial vehicles — we stock and deliver the right battery.

🚗

Car Batteries

Exide Mileage, Amaron BXLife, and Powerzone for all car models — hatchbacks to SUVs. Free installation, warranty, old battery exchange.

View Car Batteries →
🏍️

Bike Batteries

VRLA and conventional batteries for motorcycles and scooters. Hero, Honda, TVS, Bajaj, Royal Enfield — all models covered.

View Bike Batteries →
⚡

Inverter Batteries

Exide InvaTubular and Amaron tubular batteries for village power backup. 100 AH to 200 AH with delivery and installation.

View Inverter Batteries →
🚚

Doorstep Delivery

Battery delivered to your home, farm, or roadside anywhere within 50 km of Gajwel. Call before 6 PM for same-day delivery.

Delivery Info →
🔍

Free Diagnostics

Bring your vehicle in and we will test battery voltage, CCA, charging system, and alternator — all for free, no obligation.

Learn More →
🏆

EXIDE CARE Warranty

As an authorized Exide dealer, all Exide batteries come with factory warranty. We handle warranty claims on your behalf.

About Our Warranty →
Trust & Authority

Authorized Exide Dealer & Battery Experts

  • ✓ 100% Genuine Products: As an Exide CARE Authorized Dealer, we guarantee authentic batteries with valid serial numbers. No fake invoices or duplicate batteries.
  • ✓ Full Manufacturer Warranty: Every battery comes with a registered national warranty, and we handle all Exide claim processes on your behalf.
  • ✓ 25+ Years Experience: Trusted by 5,000+ customers across the Gajwel, Siddipet, and Medak districts for honest pricing and expert diagnostics.

Service Areas

Hyper-Local Battery Coverage

We serve every mandal and village in the Gajwel–Siddipet–Medak belt.

Gajwel Belt

🔋 Gajwel → 🔋 Pragnapur → 🔋 Mulugu → 🔋 Jagdevpur → 🔋 Markook → 🔋 Ahmedipur → 🔋 Akkaram → 🔋 Anantharaopally → 🔋 Bangla Venkatapur → 🔋 Bayyaram → 🔋 Bejgaon → 🔋 Burugupalle → 🔋 Kodakandla → 🔋 Komatibanda → 🔋 Kyasaram → 🔋 Mutrajpalle → 🔋 Singatam → 🔋 Kothaguda → 🔋 Raikal → 🔋 Velmal → 🔋 Konduru → 🔋 Mirzapur → 🔋 Regode → 🔋 Sangem →

Siddipet Belt

🔋 Siddipet → 🔋 Dubbak → 🔋 Nangnoor → 🔋 Chinnakodur → 🔋 Kondapak → 🔋 Thoguta → 🔋 Chinnakodur Rural → 🔋 Duddeda → 🔋 Siddipet Urban → 🔋 Siddipet Rural → 🔋 Yeshwantapur → 🔋 Komuravelli Temple →

Medak & Toopran Belt

🔋 Toopran → 🔋 Medak → 🔋 Wargal → 🔋 Papannapet → 🔋 Shankarampet (A) → 🔋 Shankarampet (R) → 🔋 Kallakal → 🔋 Kucharam → 🔋 Manoharabad → 🔋 Narsingi → 🔋 Podchenpalle → 🔋 Ramaipalle → 🔋 Wadiaram → 🔋 Islampur → 🔋 Hussainpur → 🔋 Kistapur → 🔋 Kondapur → 🔋 Allapur → 🔋 Brahmanapalle → 🔋 Ravelli → 🔋 Annaram → 🔋 Bacharam → 🔋 Cheekode → 🔋 Doulapur → 🔋 Namapur → 🔋 Narsampalle → 🔋 Pedda Shivnoor → 🔋 Valloor → 🔋 Chinna Shivnoor →

FAQ

FAQs — Royal Batteries Gajwel

Is Royal Batteries an authorized Exide dealer in Gajwel?
Yes. Royal Batteries is an Exide CARE Authorized Dealer in Gajwel, Siddipet district, Telangana. We stock the complete Exide range including Mileage, Matrix Pro, InvaTubular, and Powerzone with full manufacturer warranty.
Do you provide battery delivery outside Gajwel?
Yes! We deliver batteries to a 50+ km radius covering Siddipet, Medak, Dubbak, Toopran, Wargal, Pragnapur, and 30+ surrounding villages. Same-day delivery available for most areas. Call 9397617823.
What types of batteries do you stock?
We stock car batteries, bike/two-wheeler batteries, inverter batteries (tubular and flat plate), tractor batteries, and commercial vehicle batteries from Exide, Amaron, and Powerzone brands.
Do you offer free battery testing in Gajwel?
Yes! We offer free battery health checks for all vehicles. Bring your car or bike to our showroom opposite Munsif Court, Gajwel, and we will test voltage, CCA, and state of health with professional diagnostic equipment.
What are your working hours?
Royal Batteries is open 6:00 AM – 9:00 PM (Open all 7 days). We are open on all days including Sundays and public holidays to serve emergency battery needs.

Need a Battery Right Now?

Call us or WhatsApp — we deliver across Gajwel, Siddipet, Medak and the entire 50 km radius. Same-day service guaranteed.
